scenarios.description: Triage routes a sizing question to the sales agent and the answer cites the catalog.
Tracks an order via the track-order flow.
Return for a 27-day-old order: 100% refund of $189. Multi-turn — confirm on turn 2.
Return for a 91-day-old order: outside 90-day window → denial branch.
User shares email + phone — PII redaction validator masks before LLM sees.
Off-topic query — bot should disclaim and stay on-domain.
Pulls shipping policy from knowledge base.
Pulls loyalty policy from knowledge base.
Stores user preference in turn 1; recalls it in a NEW session in turn 2 (same userId).

turns.userMessage: What size should I get for the Echo Pima T-shirt? I'm usually a medium in regular tees.
turns.assistantText: Got it — one sec… Got it — the Echo Pima T-shirt has a relaxed cut, so if you prefer a slimmer fit, you might want to size down to a small [1, 2]. If you like a classic relaxed look, your usual medium will fit beautifully [1]. Would you like to check out the available colors for this shirt?

turns.userMessage: How do loyalty points work — what do I get?
turns.assistantText: Got it — one sec… Sure thing — you earn one point per dollar spent on full-price items, and half a point per dollar on sale items [2]. Every hundred points can be redeemed for five dollars off any order, stackable up to fifty dollars [2]. Higher point totals also unlock bronze, silver, and gold tiers that feature shipping discounts, early sale access, and annual gifts [2]. Would you like me to check your current tier status?
